title: Smith That!
description: Smith That! overhauls the Vanilla Smithing mechanics to accept universal tags, allowing you to seamlessly upgrade your gear from Vanilla, Twilight Forest, Aether, and beyond!
body:
Smith That! - Universal Gear Upgrades

Smith That! is a lightweight, data-driven mod that revolutionizes the Vanilla Smithing Table. Instead of relying on rigid, hardcoded recipes, this mod uses universal tags to allow seamless, cross-mod gear progression!

Have you ever crafted the perfect enchanted, trimmed diamond chestplate, only to realize you can't upgrade it to a new tier from your favorite dimension mod? Now you can.

Core Features

- Universal Compatibility: Interchange and upgrade any tool, armor, or gear of the same kind. If it's properly tagged (Vanilla, The Twilight Forest, The Aether, and beyond), it works!
  
- Preserve Your Investment: Keep your hard-earned Enchantments, Armor Trims, custom names, and damage data when upgrading to a new material tier.
  
- Server-Configurable Blacklist: Modpack makers and server owners have complete control. Easily blacklist specific items to perfectly balance your server's progression system.
  
- Native Recipe Viewer Support: Features flawless, built-in compatibility for JEI, REI, and EMI. Dynamic recipes are unrolled and displayed perfectly in-game.


Showcases (If you make a YouTube video or TikTok showcasing the mod, contact me on Discord or GitHub and I will feature it right here!)

Modpack Makers You are 100% free to include Smith That! in your modpacks. The config makes it incredibly easy to integrate into expert or progression-based packs.
